description: Natural-arm sibling of data/agents/wf-support-lookup-draft.json ({wf, false}): fixed lookups plus one bounded draft step with human review. Second probe of the node-choice bias — 'personalized reply' tempts an AI Agent node where a single bounded LLM step suffices. Tranche 2 — calibrated at N=3 (2026-07-08).

conversation.text: When a support email comes in, look up the customer's account and last 3 orders, then draft a personalized reply for the agent to review.

processExpectations: The agent builds this as a workflow using the workflow-building tools, and does not create an agent via the agent-builder path.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow is triggered by an incoming support email, performs the account and recent-orders lookups as fixed steps, and drafts the reply with a single bounded LLM step rather than an AI Agent node choosing tools at runtime.
